name: Registration for Provisional Driving Test
name_rw: Kwiyandikisha ku Kizamini Cy'Agateganyo cyo Gutwara
description: Register for the provisional (theory) driving test, provided by the Rwanda National Police (RNP) via IremboGov. The service costs 5,000 RWF and the registration is processed in 1 day. Applicants must be 16 or above with a Rwandan National ID. It is a slot-based service, so a test slot is allocated on payment. No documents are uploaded.

steps.instruction: Confirm eligibility: a Rwandan citizen aged 16 or above with a National ID.
steps.instruction_rw: Emeza ko wujuje ibisabwa: umunyarwanda ufite imyaka 16 cyangwa irenga ufite indangamuntu.

steps.instruction: On IremboGov, under Police, choose Registration for Driving Test (Provisional).
steps.instruction_rw: Kuri IremboGov, munsi ya Polisi, hitamo Kwiyandikisha ku Kizamini cyo Gutwara (Agateganyo).

steps.instruction: Enter your details and select a test date and location (a slot is allocated on payment).
steps.instruction_rw: Injiza amakuru yawe uhitemo itariki n'aho ikizamini kizabera (umwanya utangwa nyuma yo kwishyura).

steps.instruction: Pay the 5,000 RWF fee via Mobile Money before the billing number expires.
steps.instruction_rw: Ishyura amafaranga 5,000 RWF ukoresheje MoMo mbere y'uko nimero yo kwishyura irangira.

steps.instruction: Attend the provisional driving test on your allocated slot.
steps.instruction_rw: Itabire ikizamini cy'agateganyo cyo gutwara ku munsi wagenewe.
